sectionHeading.title: Selected projects demonstrating problem-solving, UI development, and system logic.
sectionHeading.description: A collection of projects showcasing frontend engineering, basic system design, and performance-focused development.

items.title: AI Stress Level Tracker
items.summary: Developed a voice-based stress detection system using audio input and AI/ML concepts. Implemented real-time interaction with a visual feedback dashboard. Achieved high performance with Lighthouse scores: Performance (96), Accessibility (98), Best Practices (96).

items.title: Rock Paper Scissors Game
items.summary: Built an interactive browser-based game using JavaScript with dynamic game logic and randomization. Focused on responsive UI and smooth gameplay experience. Achieved Lighthouse scores: Performance (90), Accessibility (100), Best Practices (100).

items.title: Student Record Management System (BST)
items.summary: Designed a web-based system using Binary Search Tree (BST) for efficient data storage and retrieval. Implemented CRUD operations with local storage and built a responsive UI for managing student records.
